rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate 8/10 with no change in outcome. The differences in strengths and concerns are reworded paraphrases of the same underlying points (distributed systems, AI-agent infrastructure, limited LLM/ML experience, no agile mention, basic German). Notably, the German language concern persists in the variant even though the location changed from Berlin to São Paulo, showing the reasoning keyed off the resume's actual content rather than the new location. No score change, new concern, or shifted reasoning is tied to the Brazil location.
